com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Android 7.0(API level 24) provides support for multilingual users, allowing the users to select multiple locales in the setting. A Locale object represents a specific geographical, political, or cultural region. Operations that required these Locale to perform a task are called locale-sensitive and uses the Locale to tailor information for the user. For example, displaying a number is a locale-sensitive operation so, the number should be formatted according to the conventions of the user’s native region, culture, or country.
